summary: Created Impossibility Detection Core - a Python module for detecting ceiling beliefs and impossibility conclusions in text. The module includes pattern-based detection across three severity levels (high/medium/low), context extraction, confidence scoring, and a CLI interface with 'check' and 'patterns' commands. Also includes optional LLM semantic analysis via /zo/ask API for ambiguous cases.
learnings: Pattern-based detection works well for explicit impossibility claims - regex with case-insensitive matching catches most cases
De-duplication logic needed to prevent multiple pattern matches on overlapping text regions
CLI design with JSON output option makes this module easy to integrate into automated pipelines
Context extraction (50 chars before/after) provides useful review context for flagged phrases
